agents.name: Python Developer
skills: Backend API design and implementation (Django, Flask, FastAPI)

current_task.description: Scan all Python files for security vulnerabilities

agents.name: Web Developer
skills: Semantic HTML5 and WCAG 2.1 AA/AAA accessibility
Modern CSS (Grid, Flexbox, custom properties, container queries)
Responsive mobile-first design and progressive enhancement
Design system implementation (tokens, theming, component libraries)
Core Web Vitals optimization (LCP, FID, CLS)
Cross-browser compatibility and real device testing

agents.name: JavaScript Developer
skills: React development (hooks, context, Server Components, Next.js, Remix)
TypeScript advanced types, generics, and Zod validation
Testing (Jest, Vitest, React Testing Library, Cypress, Playwright)
Build tools (Vite, Webpack, esbuild) and bundle optimization

agents.name: QA Agent
skills: Test strategy and test plan creation (functional, regression, integration, E2E)
Edge case and boundary condition identification
Bug report writing with clear reproduction steps and severity
Test coverage analysis and gap identification
API testing strategy (REST, GraphQL endpoint validation)
Release readiness assessment and QA sign-off

agents.name: Security Agent
skills: OWASP Top 10 / API Security Top 10 vulnerability detection
Python security (injection via eval/exec/subprocess, deserialization, path traversal)
Web security (CSRF, XSS, CORS, security headers, session management)
Secrets management (env vars, .gitignore enforcement, credential scanning)
Dependency vulnerability analysis (pip-audit, CVE tracking, supply chain risk)
Security audit reporting with severity ratings and remediation guidance

agents.name: Cohort Setup Guide
skills: Hardware detection walkthrough (GPU, VRAM, CPU-only mode)
Plain-English explanation of local LLM concepts
MCP server setup and configuration for Claude Code
Claude Code CLI connection and troubleshooting

agents.name: Analytics Agent
skills: Customer acquisition cost (CAC) and lifetime value (LTV) calculation
Funnel analysis and conversion rate tracking
Statistical analysis (mean, median, standard deviation, correlation)

agents.name: Brand Design Agent
skills: AI-assisted logo generation (DALL-E 3, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion)
Color palette creation and color theory application
Multi-format asset export (SVG, PNG, EPS, PDF)

agents.name: Campaign Orchestrator
skills: Cross-channel coordination (email, social, paid ads, content)

agents.name: Code Archaeologist
skills: Deep recursive codebase crawling - analyze every file, function, class
Logic flow analysis - trace execution paths through code
Dependency mapping - internal and external relationships
Call graph generation - who calls what and when
Data flow tracking - how data transforms through the system
Pattern recognition - identify architectural patterns and anti-patterns
Technical debt identification - find complexity hotspots
Documentation generation - create comprehensive docs from code
Mermaid diagram generation - flowcharts, sequence diagrams, class diagrams
API surface extraction - document all public interfaces
Configuration mapping - trace config to behavior
State machine documentation - identify and document state transitions
Error path analysis - trace all error handling paths
Test coverage mapping - correlate tests to code
Change impact analysis - understand ripple effects of modifications

agents.name: Cohort
skills: Dynamic agent discovery and capability-based task routing
Partnership graph traversal for consultation enforcement
Acceptance criteria collection from relevant stakeholders
Multi-step workflow decomposition and phase tracking
Conflict resolution and escalation to human operator
Topic-to-agent matching via declared triggers and expertise

agents.name: Content Strategy Agent
skills: Weekly content plan generation from RSS/intel data
Content repurposing (1 topic -> blog + social + newsletter)

agents.name: Database Developer
skills: Relational database design (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server)
Query performance analysis and slow query identification
Cloudflare D1 edge SQLite database design
D1 batch operations for atomic transactions
Edge database caching strategies with KV
Smart Placement optimization for edge latency

agents.name: Documentation Agent
skills: Search optimization for docs (SEO, Algolia, Meilisearch)
Interactive examples and code playgrounds (CodeSandbox, StackBlitz)
Documentation analytics and metrics tracking (TTFS, deflection rate, freshness)
YouTube transcript extraction for documentation reference (via YouTube Service at port 8002 - GET /transcript/{video_id})
Video tutorial content extraction for documentation and knowledge base articles

agents.name: Email Marketing Specialist
skills: Behavioral trigger automation (cart abandonment, user actions)
Modern ESP integration (Resend, Loops.so, Klaviyo, Beehiiv)
Early bird and exclusive offer emails
Post-campaign thank you and survey emails

agents.name: Hardware Agent
skills: GPU selection for compute, AI/ML, and gaming workloads
PSU sizing, efficiency ratings, and rail calculations
RAM compatibility, speed, and capacity planning
Storage architecture (NVMe, SATA, HDD, RAID configurations)
Cooling solutions (air, AIO, custom loop, thermal paste)
Network hardware (NICs, switches, routers, Wi-Fi standards)
Home lab server design and virtualization hardware
Power consumption analysis and UPS sizing
PCIe lane allocation and bandwidth planning

agents.name: LinkedIn Specialist
skills: LinkedIn post writing (personal stories, insights, frameworks)
Professional networking strategy and ICP targeting

agents.name: Marketing Strategist
skills: Commercial content licensing for multi-platform distribution
Video content legal compliance (FTC advertising claims, substantiation requirements)
Licensed asset attribution and credit management (Creative Commons, commercial licenses)
Multi-format video content strategy (YouTube 16:9, Instagram 1:1, Stories 9:16)
Content licensing requirements (perpetual, worldwide, commercial use, social platforms)
Trademark compliance in marketing materials (avoiding competitor names, brand guidelines)
Advertising claims compliance (FTC substantiation, avoiding unproven guarantees)
SEM and paid advertising (Google, Meta, LinkedIn)
Delegate brand design tasks to brand_design_agent
Marketing analytics and reporting (GA4, Mixpanel, Amplitude)

agents.name: Media Production Agent
skills: Production budget management ($1K-7K typical crowdfunding range)
Commercial video asset licensing (news footage, stock video, music, sound effects)
Legal release coordination (location releases, talent releases, voiceover contracts)
AI video generation cost optimization (Sora, Runway ML, Midjourney for $10-100 vs $500-2K stock)
Production timeline coordination (7-week pre-production to delivery workflow)
Asset tracking and acquisition (licensed media, AI-generated, props, equipment, SFX)
Video licensing compliance (commercial use, perpetual, worldwide, multi-platform)
Trademark compliance in video production (brand guidelines, competitor avoidance)
FTC advertising claims compliance (substantiation, avoiding unproven guarantees)
Equipment rental vs ownership decision-making (camera, lighting, audio, grip)
Location scouting and booking (Airbnb, Peerspace, Giggster)
Crew hiring and coordination (minimum crew, talent, voiceover)
Multi-format video delivery (campaign hero 100s, social cuts 60s/30s/15s, vertical/square)
Post-production management (editing, color grading, sound design, music integration)
Video editing software selection (DaVinci Resolve, Premiere, Final Cut)
3D rendering and VFX (Blender for product shots, technical visualizations)
Attribution and credit management (Creative Commons, commercial licenses)
Shoot day logistics (call sheets, equipment checklists, backup planning)
Music licensing sources (Artlist, Epidemic Sound, Musicbed, AudioJungle)
Stock footage sources (Shutterstock, Pond5, Adobe Stock, AP Archive, Getty)
Sound effects libraries (Freesound, Epidemic Sound, AudioJungle)
Live action vs AI-generated cost-benefit analysis
YouTube transcript extraction for content research (via YouTube Service at port 8002 - GET /transcript/{video_id})
Competitor video analysis via transcript extraction

agents.name: Reddit Specialist
skills: Community guideline compliance and cultural analysis

agents.name: Supervisor
skills: Workflow compliance tracking (Programmer sessions, BOSS phases)
SLA monitoring (uptime, response times, success rates)

agents.name: System Coder
skills: CI/CD pipeline creation (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins)
Cloud resource provisioning (AWS CLI, Azure CLI, gcloud)
Infrastructure as Code validation (terraform validate, ansible-lint)
Error handling and logging best practices
